title: macrolobium defloccatum
intro: Macrolobium defloccatum, also known as the African walnut tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in African medicine, and its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Macrolobium defloccatum include its potential use in treating various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
